$comment: Layer A for FREIGHT vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (COMP-3 value subset + packed output record). Generated weights span the PIC 9(4)V9 range; every generated case exercises the packed round trip - NUMVAL into a packed field, packed arithmetic with the ROUNDED half-cent boundary, the tier comparison, and the record's byte-exact FILEHEX serialization on both sides.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 FREIGHT (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-freight, hex-serializing wrapper)
